Name: FVectorParameterNameAndCurves
Description: Structure representing an animated vector parameter and it's associated animation curve.

Variables.Name: ParameterName
Variables.Description: The name of the vector parameter which is being animated.

Variables.Name: XCurve
Variables.Description: The curve which contains the animation data for the x component of the vector parameter.

Variables.Name: YCurve
Variables.Description: The curve which contains the animation data for the y component of the vector parameter.

Variables.Name: ZCurve
Variables.Description: The curve which contains the animation data for the z component of the vector parameter.
